reasoning: Comparing the expected daily mean temperature at Marignane in late October (~16.5°C) versus late January (~7.5°C), the average difference is approximately -9°C. Assuming typical daily temperature variability at this location (standard deviation of ~3.5°C), the standard deviation of the difference between two independent days is ~4.95°C. This corresponds to a Z-score of roughly -1.8, leading to ~3.5% to 4% probability that a late January day is warmer. Given that the resolution date listed is the close date (2026-01-24), the climatological base rate indicates it is highly unlikely to be warmer than a typical late October day.
